# Harshil Raj
> Making sense of AI for people building products, startups, and systems.
> Based in India. Active on LinkedIn (9,400+ followers).

## What I Do
I help founders, operators, and product teams navigate AI — from strategy to systems.
Three areas: AI Systems (building and deploying real workflows), Product (integrating AI into products that ship), Go-To-Market (using AI to build scalable GTM engines).

## Services
- AI systems design and deployment (multi-model workflows, automation pipelines, Make/n8n, Retell AI, OpenAI)
- Cloud infrastructure on AWS and Google Cloud
- AI strategy and consulting for startups and SMBs
- GTM engine building with AI (content, outreach, operations)

## Background
- CSE graduate with AI/ML minor
- Former Project Manager at a tech startup (shipped products under pressure)
- Founder of Livo — delivered web, app, and Shopify builds for clients
- Now building AI-native operations for businesses that want to scale without headcount

## Proof of Work
- 9,400+ LinkedIn followers (organic, no paid growth)
- Active voice on AI-native operations, product, and GTM
- Built AI receptionist systems on Retell AI + OpenAI + Make/n8n
